_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: We confirmed this finding with proteomic profiling by showing a sharp decrease in MET activation and downstream signaling immediately after capmatinib treatment
details: Caused sharp decrease in MET activation and downstream signaling immediately after treatment in NF1-MET tumors
